name: ASRock B660M-ITX/eDP Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel B660 Chipset - Support DDR4-5000+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel Gigabit LAN - Intel 802.11ac WiFi - Bluetooth 5.1
shortName: ASRock B660M-ITX/eDP Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Mini-ITX motherboard for LGA 1700 with Intel B660 chipset, DDR4 support, and integrated WiFi.
